phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trova la biglietteria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah lah bee-lyeh-tteh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'imbarco per Bellagio, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOOzee dohVEH limBARko pair behLLAHjo pair fahVOreh

likely_response.local: Segua le indicazioni per l'imbarco numero tre.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR l'eem-BAHR-koh noo-MEH-roh TREH
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for boarding number three.

responses.english: Follow the signs for boarding number three.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR l'eem-BAHR-koh noo-MEH-roh TREH
responses.french: Segua le indicazioni per l'imbarco numero tre.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si compra il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see KOM-prah eel bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Buy the ticket at the machine.

responses.english: Buy the ticket at the machine.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove sono i bagni pubblici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh SOH-noh ee BAH-nyee POOB-blee-chee, per fah-VOH-reh
